name: Primavera-Marinara Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions in oil in a large nonstick skillet until softened, about 6 minutes.
2. Add garlic, crushed tomatoes, tomato sauce, broccoli, cauliflower, carrots, parsley, basil, and oregano. Bring to boiling. Lower heat; partially cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Serve half cup of sauce over one cup cooked pasta.
